name: freelance-delivery
description: Dispute resolution for freelance delivery contracts — work for hire with deadlines and deliverables

rules.ruling_template:
The respondent fulfilled all contractual obligations.
Deliverable(s) were accepted on {acceptance_date}.
No remedy is owed.

The deliverable was accepted but delivered {days_late} days late.
Per contract terms, late delivery warrants {late_penalty}.

The respondent failed to deliver the agreed-upon work.
No deliverable was produced or submitted.
Full remedy owed to claimant.

rules.condition:
deliverable_was_accepted == false AND
evidence_of_delivery == true AND
quality_issues_documented == true

rules.ruling_template:
Only partial work was delivered. {partial_summary}
Remedy: proportional refund.

Work appears to have been delivered but acceptance is disputed.
Cannot determine if deliverable met requirements.
Recommend escalation or additional evidence.
